title: Product Listing
description: Schema for e-commerce product listings from marketplaces and direct retail sites.

variant_option.description: A product variant dimension and its value.

title.description: Product title or name. Commonly found in: product page h1, og:title meta tag, product card title.

brand.description: Brand or manufacturer name. Commonly found in: brand field in product details, product byline, breadcrumb.

asin_or_sku.description: Platform-specific product identifier (ASIN, SKU, or product ID). Commonly found in: product details table, URL parameter, item number field.

platform.description: E-commerce platform or marketplace (e.g., Amazon, Walmart, Shopify). Commonly found in: site domain, platform branding, page footer.

price.description: Current listed price. Commonly found in: price display, product price span, JSON-LD price field.

sale_price.description: Sale or discounted price. Commonly found in: sale price display, discounted price label, strikethrough price context.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code. Commonly found in: price currency symbol, JSON-LD priceCurrency, locale settings.

availability.description: Current availability status of the product. Commonly found in: availability badge, in stock indicator, JSON-LD availability field.

condition.description: Condition of the product. Commonly found in: condition badge, product condition field, used/new selector.

variant_options.description: Available variant options (e.g., color, size). Commonly found in: variant selector buttons, color/size options, product options section.

review_count.description: Total number of customer reviews. Commonly found in: review count label, ratings summary, review section header.

review_rating.description: Average customer review rating. Commonly found in: star rating display, average rating number, JSON-LD ratingValue.

seller_name.description: Name of the seller or vendor. Commonly found in: sold by field, seller name display, merchant info section.

fulfillment_type.description: Fulfillment method (Fulfilled by Amazon, Merchant, or Direct). Commonly found in: fulfillment badge, ships from label, sold and shipped by text.

images.description: URLs of product images. Commonly found in: product image gallery, image carousel, og:image meta tag.

description.description: Full product description text. Commonly found in: product description section, about this item, product overview.

features_list.description: Bullet-point feature list. Commonly found in: feature bullets section, key features list, product highlights.

category.description: Primary product category. Commonly found in: breadcrumb navigation, category field, product metadata.

subcategory.description: Product subcategory. Commonly found in: breadcrumb navigation, subcategory field, product metadata.

rank_in_category.description: Bestseller or sales rank within the category. Commonly found in: bestseller rank section, category rank display, product details.

source_url.description: URL of the product page from which this data was extracted. Commonly found in: browser URL bar, canonical link tag, og:url meta tag.

extracted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this product was extracted. Commonly found in: extraction metadata, scraper system timestamp.
